summary: Alembic tracks database migrations using revision scripts (`upgrade()` & `downgrade()`) and the `alembic_version` table.
oneLineSummary: Alembic provides version control for database schemas using upgrade and downgrade functions.

commonErrors.cause: Manual DB changes out of sync with Alembic
commonErrors.fix: Stamp database version with alembic stamp head
